scenarios.title: Agent Framework Development
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task mentions Google ADK Python, google-adk, google.adk, Agent, Workflow, Runner, tools, ADK CLI, ADK evaluation, or changing the ADK Python repo.
scenarios.role: Provides self-contained routing and task guidance for building, running, debugging, evaluating, deploying, and maintaining ADK Python applications and the ADK Python source repository.
scenarios.read_when: google-adk, google.adk, ADK Python, Agent, LlmAgent, Workflow, BaseNode, Runner, adk run, adk web, adk eval, ToolContext, FunctionTool, MCP toolset, ADK repo tests, AgentConfig.json
scenarios.best_for: Constructing ADK agents and Workflow graphs, binding tools, configuring runtime services, using CLI/YAML/deployment flows, debugging sessions/evals/traces, and selecting ADK repo validation commands.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task concerns a different ADK implementation, a generic agent framework with no ADK signals, or cloud product administration that does not involve ADK Python APIs or CLI.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `adk-python` over generic Python or agent skills when the task names ADK concepts, the google-adk distribution, the adk CLI, or files under an ADK Python checkout; use sub-skill routes to narrow to library usage, workflow graphs, CLI/deployment, debugging/eval, or repository maintenance.
